memory.summary: The room's poor hygiene and smell are severely impacting my focus and sleep. Moving to the library would immediately restore my ability to work effectively.
Roommate_R is in a low-energy slump and would respond reasonably to a direct, kind request. I have already messaged them about the odor issue.
I pushed the Reading response deadline back to compensate for sleep debt. I must now make up this lost time while managing low energy and poor room conditions.
Moving to the library protects focus but won't fix the room's odor or sleep debt, so I must address the hygiene issue tonight despite low energy.
The Reading response deadline passed unfinished despite my delay, increasing my stress and sleep debt while leaving the room odor unresolved.
The Reading response deadline was pushed back to Tuesday, but I still have 2 hours of sleep debt and high stress. I must make up this time later while managing low energy.
I made progress on the reading response, but my stress and sleep debt remain high. The roommate is back in the room, offering a chance to address the hygiene issue now.
The reading deadline is moved to Tuesday, and the roommate apologized for the odor issue. My stress and sleep debt remain high despite this progress.
Worked 2 hours on the reading response, raising progress to 0.82. Sleep debt and stress remain high despite the deadline extension.
Progress on the reading response increased to 0.87, but high stress and two hours of sleep debt persist despite the roommate resolving hygiene issues.
Progress on the reading response improved to 0.93 after two hours of work, though high stress and two hours of sleep debt remain unresolved.
I advanced the reading response to 0.97 in just 1.5 hours, significantly improving progress despite still carrying 2 hours of sleep debt and high stress.
